company_info.description: FUNDINNO,Inc. engages in the financial instruments trading operation business in Japan. The company involved in the operation of FUNDINNO, a type 1 small-amount electronic offering business; operation of FUNDINNO PLUS+, a type 1 financial instruments business; operation of FUNDINNO MARKET and FUNDINNO MARKET PLUS+, type 1 financial instruments business; FUNDOOR and development of MUFG FUNDOOR, as well as in the provision of corporate growth support consulting and recruitment services. The company was formerly known as Japan Cloud Capital, Inc. FUNDINNO,Inc. was incorporated in 2015 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
